headlines.headline: Dralol Computing signs multi-year partnership with a top-tier research institute

headlines.headline: Kelvos Resources reports record quarterly revenue, up 7% year-over-year

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
